name: Caregiver shift reminders daily report sub workflow pt.1

values.lookupValue: ERROR - Missing or undefined data (please check that shift is assigned and phone number is available for caregiver)

parameters.jsCode: return $json.d.results.map(item => ({ json: item }));

parameters.url: =https://netorg10246608.sharepoint.com/sites/RAH/_api/web/lists/GetByTitle('Caregiver Shift Reminder')/items?$filter=VisitStartDate eq '{{$json.tomorrow}}' and TextStatus eq 'Processed - Pending SMS Confirmation'

parameters.jsCode: return $json.d.results.map(item => ({ json: item }));

const n = ($json.value || []).length;
return [{ json: { message1: 'Total number of shifts tomorrow: ' + n } }];

const n = ($json.value || []).length;
return [{ json: { messagea: 'Total number of shifts missing caregiver or phone number: ' + n } }];

const n = ($json.value || []).length;
return [{ json: { message2: 'Total number of shifts processed: ' + n } }];

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.value: =VisitStartDate ge datetime'{{$json.tomorrowStart}}' and VisitStartDate lt datetime'{{$json.tomorrowEnd}}'
